title: CSRF Token Response DTO
description: 200 body for GET /api/v1/auth/csrf-token (side-effect-free, auth-required). The same token is also set as a non-HttpOnly `traigent_csrf_token` cookie (max-age 3600, SameSite=Lax, Secure in production); the client mirrors it back in the `X-CSRF-Token` request header on state-changing requests (double-submit-cookie pattern). No session-expiry field is carried here.

csrf_token.description: Random CSRF token (also delivered via the traigent_csrf_token cookie).
